G5614.strongs_def: oh save!; hosanna (i.e. hoshia-na), an exclamation of adoration

G5610.kjv_def: day, hour, instant, season, X short, (even-)tide, (high) time

G5615.derivation: from G5613 (ὡς) and an adverb from G846 (αὐτός);
G5615.strongs_def: as thus, i.e. in the same way
G5615.kjv_def: even so, likewise, after the same (in like) manner

G5605.strongs_def: to experience the pains of parturition (literally or figuratively)

G5612.derivation: middle voice of an apparently primary verb;

G5600.strongs_def: (may, might, can, could, would, should, must, etc.; also with G1487 (εἰ) and its comparative, as well as with other particles) be
G5600.kjv_def: + appear, are, (may, might, should) be, X have, is, + pass the flower of her age, should stand, were

G5604.strongs_def: a pang or throe, especially of childbirth

G5608.derivation: middle voice from an apparently primary (a sum or price);
G5608.strongs_def: to purchase (synonymous with the earlier G4092 (πίμπρημι))

G5620.strongs_def: so too, i.e. thus therefore (in various relations of consecution, as follow)
G5620.kjv_def: (insomuch) as, so that (then), (insomuch) that, therefore, to, wherefore

G5621.strongs_def: an earlet, i.e. one of the ears, or perhaps the lobe of the ear

G5602.derivation: from an adverb form of G3592 (ὅδε);
G5602.strongs_def: in this same spot, i.e. here or hither

G5613.derivation: probably adverb of comparative from G3739 (ὅς);
G5613.strongs_def: which how, i.e. in that manner (very variously used, as follows)
G5613.kjv_def: about, after (that), (according) as (it had been, it were), as soon (as), even as (like), for, how (greatly), like (as, unto), since, so (that), that, to wit, unto, when(-soever), while, X with all speed

G5619.strongs_def: just as if, i.e. as it were

G5623.strongs_def: to be useful, i.e. to benefit

G5622.derivation: from a derivative of the base of G5624 (ὠφέλιμος);

G5603.strongs_def: a chant or "ode" (the general term for any words sung; while G5215 (ὕμνος) denotes especially a religious metrical composition, and G5568 (ψαλμός) still more specially, a Hebrew cantillation)

G5611.strongs_def: belonging to the right hour or season (timely), i.e. (by implication) flourishing (beauteous (figuratively))

G5606.derivation: perhaps from the alternate of G5342 (φέρω);
G5606.strongs_def: the shoulder (as that on which burdens are borne)

G5616.kjv_def: about, as (it had been, it were), like (as)
